title: aster novi-belgii var. adulterinus
intro: Aster novi-belgii var. adulterinus, also known as New York aster, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii var. adulterinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
